meanings.definition: the relation that exists when things occur at the same time
examples: the drug produces an increased synchrony of the brain waves

meanings.definition: an adjustment that causes something to occur or recur in unison
coordinating by causing to indicate the same time
examples: the synchronization of their watches was an important preliminary

meanings.definition: make synchronous and adjust in time or manner
make (motion picture sound) exactly simultaneous with the action
arrange or represent events so that they co-occur
cause to indicate the same time or rate
